tests.name: t1
tests.prompt: David säger att scanningen inte funkar i produktion.
assertions: Mentions checking application logs for crashes or exceptions
Mentions checking the database (Supabase) connectivity or rows
References the scan-debug skill or pipeline for 0-lead issues
Proceeds in a defined diagnostic order rather than guessing

tests.name: t2
tests.prompt: Betalningen gick igenom men användaren fick inga credits.
assertions: Mentions checking the Stripe webhook or payment events
Mentions checking the database for the credit or row update
Suggests verifying logs for errors during the webhook handling
